IGUI_DCS_Panel_FooterVendorUnlock: Complete %1 more Challenge(s) to reveal today's Token Vendor Locations
IGUI_DCS_Panel_FooterStreakHint1: Complete 1 Challenge today to unlock the next Level
IGUI_DCS_Panel_FooterStreakHint2: Complete 1 Challenge per Day for the next %1 Day(s) to unlock the next Level
IGUI_DCS_Panel_FooterStreakReward1: Complete 1 Challenge today to earn a Reward of 25 Tokens
IGUI_DCS_Panel_FooterStreakReward2: Complete 1 Challenge per Day for the next %1 Day(s) to earn a Reward of 25 Tokens
IGUI_DCS_Panel_HelpHowItWorks: Every day at Midnight UTC, 7 new Challenges become available for Players to complete. Complete Challenges to earn Tokens. Completing 1 Challenge per day keeps your Streak alive. Complete all 7 Challenges per day to earn Bonus Tokens. Tokens can be exchanged for Items at the 'Token Vendors'.
IGUI_DCS_Panel_HelpKill: Kill Challenges: Slay Zombies with anything from a Broom to an M16 Assault Rifle. Challenges range from generic Zombie killing headcounts to weapon-specific kill counts covering almost every melee weapon, firearm, and improvised weapon in the game.
IGUI_DCS_Panel_HelpDeliver: Quest Challenges: Find the required item(s), travel to the location and deposit them in to the designated Safe.
IGUI_DCS_Panel_HelpVisit: Visit Challenges: David's cousin, Barney the Gnome, has landed in Knox Country. Head to the location and find Barney to complete the Challenge.
IGUI_DCS_Panel_HelpEat: Eat/Drink Challenges: Cook and consume specific meals, find and consume non-perishable food and drinks or forage/farm and consume some fresh produce.
IGUI_DCS_Panel_HelpFish: Wilderness Challenges: Reel in a specific fish species, hunt a wild animal, or forage for materials and supplies in the wilderness.
IGUI_DCS_Panel_HelpCraft: Craft/Build Challenges: Craft tools, weapons, and clothes from raw materials, or build walls, fences, doors, crates, and other structures.
IGUI_DCS_Panel_HelpMisc: Miscellaneous Challenges: Travel a set distance by foot or in a Vehicle. Read books and magazines. Change your hairstyle or apply makeup. Install or remove vehicle parts and more.
IGUI_DCS_Panel_HelpStreak: Complete 1 Challenge per day to maintain a Streak. Maintaining a Daily Streak pushes you through 4 reward tiers over 28 days. Early tiers pay 1 Token per Challenge; the final tier pays 4 Tokens per Challenge. Finish all 7 Challenges in one day for bonus Tokens. Complete a 28 day Streak for a 25-token milestone before the cycle resets.
IGUI_DCS_Panel_HelpVendors: Exchange Tokens for Items. Available Stock and Stock count randomizes daily. Two random Vendor locations spawn each day — one on the east side of the map, one on the west. Complete all 7 Challenges per day to unlock their Locations.
IGUI_DCS_Panel_HelpTabChallenges: Today's Challenges: View your current Challenges and progress.
IGUI_DCS_Panel_HelpTabChallengeLB: Challenge Leaderboard: Shows the Players with the most Challenges completed and the fastest times.
IGUI_DCS_Panel_HelpTabStreakLB: Streak Leaderboard: Shows the Players with the Longest Streaks and most Tokens.
IGUI_DCS_Panel_HelpControls: Open this panel via the toolbar button or by using the M key radial menu. A hotkey can be also assigned in Options under 'Mods'.
IGUI_DCS_Panel_LB_FastestAll: Fastest Time to Complete all 7 Challenges
IGUI_DCS_Debug_RemoveLBInstruction: Select a Player to remove from the leaderboard:
IGUI_DCS_Debug_RemoveLBEntryInstruction: Select a Leaderboard entry to remove:
IGUI_DCS_Debug_Tooltip_RemoveLBEntry: Remove a specific entry from a leaderboard category.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_Tooltip_ResetAll: Opens a window to wipe all DCS Data, including Tokens, progress, and leaderboards.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_Tooltip_ClearTokens: Opens a window to clear Token balances for selected or all Players.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_Tooltip_AddTokens: Opens a window to set Token balances for any Player (Online or Offline).
IGUI_DCS_Debug_Tooltip_ClearProgress: Opens a window to clear Daily Progress, kills, and Challenge completions.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_Tooltip_RemoveFromLB: Remove one Player (e.g. a banned cheater) from every leaderboard category.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_Tooltip_OpenVendorEast: Opens the East Token Vendor window.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_Tooltip_OpenVendorWest: Opens the West Token Vendor window.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_Tooltip_EditShop: Open the Vendor Editor to toggle items, set costs, and manage stock.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_Tooltip_Backup: Export all DCS Data to a timestamped backup file.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_Tooltip_LoadBackup: Import DCS Data from a backup file.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_Tooltip_ToggleCheats: Toggle Fast Move, Unlimited Ammo, and other debug cheats.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_Tooltip_SelectChallenge: Force a specific Challenge into today's list.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_Tooltip_ForceNextDay: Advance to the next day: new Challenges, new Vendors, reset progress.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_Tooltip_ForceRePlaceObjec: Remove and freshly re-place every Safe/Vendor/Gnome using current placement logic, without changing today's Challenges. Use this to retest a placement fix without waiting for the daily anchor to change.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_Tooltip_ObjectStateCheck: Dump a full state snapshot of today's DCS objects: server registry vs live objects, stale keys, overlay pins. Diagnoses the recurring safe/overlay bug where objects lose their pin + interaction after login.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_Tooltip_CompleteNext: Complete a random Challenge, update Streak, then advance to next day.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_Tooltip_Add1Token: Debug: adds 1 Token to your own balance.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_Tooltip_TeleportLoc: Teleport to any Quest/Visit Challenge location.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_Tooltip_TeleportTraders: Teleport to the East and West Token Vendor locations.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_Tooltip_TeleportQuest: Teleport to today's Quest/Deliver object locations.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_Tooltip_CompleteAll: Complete all 7 daily Challenges instantly, earn all Tokens and Streak credit.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_HelpDescription: This window provides Admin tools for managing the Daily Challenge System.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_HelpResetAll: Reset All DCS Data: Opens a window to wipe all DCS Data (Tokens, Streak, Progress) for selected or all Players.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_HelpClearTokens: Clear Tokens: Opens a window to clear Token balances for selected or all Players.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_HelpClearProgress: Clear Daily Progress: Opens a window to clear Daily Progress for selected or all Players.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_HelpOfflinePlayers: Note: The Reset, Clear, and Set/Add Token actions apply to Online and Offline Players. Changes to Online Players are effective immediately, while changes to Offline Players are saved to their data and take effect the next time they log in.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_HelpOfflineLeaderboard: Changes to Players who have Leaderboard positions reflect the change when the Leaderboard updates on daily reset.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_HelpResetLeaderboard: Reset Leaderboard: Resets the entire Leaderboard across all categories.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_HelpRemoveFromLeaderboard: Remove Player from Leaderboard: Removes a single Player (e.g. a banned cheater) from every Leaderboard category.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_HelpRemoveLBEntry: Remove Leaderboard Entry: Removes a specific entry from a leaderboard category (e.g. a single incorrect speedrun time).
IGUI_DCS_Debug_HelpOpenVendor: Open Token Vendor: Opens the Token Vendor window (each sells half of the day's items).
IGUI_DCS_Debug_HelpEditShop: Edit Shop Items: Opens the Vendor Editor to toggle items, costs, and stock ranges.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_HelpBackup: Backup DCS Data: Exports all DCS Data to a backup file.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_HelpLoadBackup: Load DCS Data from Backup: Imports DCS Data from a backup file. Overwrites current Data.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_ConfirmResetLB: Are you sure you want to Reset the Leaderboard for ALL Users? This cannot be undone.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_ConfirmRemoveFromLB: Remove "%1" from ALL Leaderboard categories? This cannot be undone.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_ConfirmRemoveLBEntry: Remove this entry from "%1"? This cannot be undone.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_ConfirmBackup: Are you sure you want to Backup DCS Data?
IGUI_DCS_Debug_ConfirmLoadBackup: Are you sure you want to Load DCS Data from Backup? This will overwrite current Data.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_SP_ConfirmResetAll: Are you sure you want to Reset ALL DCS Data? This cannot be undone.
IGUI_DCS_Debug_SP_ConfirmClearTokens: Are you sure you want to clear your Token balance?
IGUI_DCS_Debug_SP_ConfirmClearProgress: Are you sure you want to clear your Daily Progress, kills, and Challenge completions?
IGUI_DCS_Debug_SP_ConfirmAddTokens: Are you sure you want to add 1 Token to your balance?
IGUI_DCS_Debug_Toast_CompleteAndNext: Debug: Challenge Complete & Forcing Next Day
IGUI_DCS_Debug_Toast_VendorsNotSynced: Debug: Token Vendor locations not yet Synced
IGUI_DCS_Debug_PickerInstruction: Select a Challenge to replace its category slot:
IGUI_DCS_Debug_TeleportInstruction: Select a location to teleport to:
IGUI_DCS_Debug_BackupInstruction: Select a backup file to restore:
IGUI_DCS_ShopAdmin_HelpIntro: This window lets you configure which items appear in the Token Vendor, their costs, and stock levels.
IGUI_DCS_ShopAdmin_HelpItemList: Each row shows an item with its icon, name, cost, and stock range.
IGUI_DCS_ShopAdmin_HelpCheckbox: Click the checkbox on the right side to enable or disable an item.
IGUI_DCS_ShopAdmin_HelpCostField: Click the Cost field to edit the Token cost for this item.
IGUI_DCS_ShopAdmin_HelpStockFields: Click the Stock Min or Stock Max fields to change how many of each item appear daily.
IGUI_DCS_ShopAdmin_HelpAddItems: Choose Items: Opens the Choose Items window to add new items to the shop.
IGUI_DCS_ShopAdmin_HelpSave: Save Changes: Sends all pending changes to the server. Changes apply immediately.
IGUI_DCS_ShopAdmin_HelpCancel: Cancel: Closes the editor without saving any changes.
IGUI_DCS_ShopAdmin_HelpTipSave: Changes are not applied until you click Save Changes.
IGUI_DCS_ShopAdmin_HelpTipDisabled: Disabled items will not appear in the Token Vendor for Players.
IGUI_DCS_ShopAdmin_HelpTipStock: Stock Min/Max controls how many of each item spawn daily. Randomized between Min and Max.
IGUI_DCS_ShopAdmin_ToggleDefaultsTooltip: Load or unload all default shop item definitions (prices and stock from the base mod).
IGUI_DCS_ShopAdmin_HelpPricingIntro: When setting Prices, keep in mind that default settings allow Players to earn:
IGUI_DCS_ShopAdmin_HelpPricingTier1: Up to 10 Tokens per day at Streak Level 1
IGUI_DCS_ShopAdmin_HelpPricingTier2: Up to 20 Tokens per day at Streak Level 2
IGUI_DCS_ShopAdmin_HelpPricingTier3: Up to 30 Tokens per day at Streak Level 3
IGUI_DCS_ShopAdmin_HelpPricingTier4: Up to 40 Tokens per day at Streak Level 4
IGUI_DCS_ShopAdmin_HelpPricingMax: Maximum Possible Tokens per Month if a Player completes all 7 Challenges, 28 Days in a row = 725 Tokens
IGUI_DCS_UserReset_Instruction_ResetAll: Select a Player to wipe all DCS Data, or click Reset All to wipe everyone.
IGUI_DCS_UserReset_Instruction_ClearToke: Select a Player to clear their Tokens, or click Clear All to clear everyone.
IGUI_DCS_UserReset_Instruction_ClearProg: Select a Player to clear their Daily Progress, or click Clear All to clear everyone.
IGUI_DCS_UserReset_Instruction_AddTokens: Set Token balance for any Player (Online or Offline).
IGUI_DCS_UserReset_SP_Instruction_ResetA: Select a Character to wipe all DCS Data, or click Reset All to wipe everyone.
IGUI_DCS_UserReset_SP_Instruction_ClearT: Select a Character to clear their Tokens, or click Clear All to clear everyone.
IGUI_DCS_UserReset_SP_Instruction_AddTok: Set Token balance for any Character (Online or Offline).
IGUI_DCS_UserReset_Tooltip_Reset: Wipe this Player's entire DCS Data, including Tokens, Streak, and Progress.
IGUI_DCS_UserReset_Tooltip_ClearTokens: Set this Player's Token balance to 0.
IGUI_DCS_UserReset_Tooltip_ClearProgress: Reset this Player's daily Completions, Kills, and Progress.
IGUI_DCS_UserReset_Tooltip_Set: Set this Player's Token balance to the entered value.
IGUI_DCS_UserReset_Tooltip_ResetAll: Wipe ALL Players' DCS Data (Online & Offline).
IGUI_DCS_UserReset_Tooltip_ClearAllToken: Set ALL Players' Token balances to 0 (Online & Offline).
IGUI_DCS_UserReset_Tooltip_ClearAllProgr: Reset ALL Players' Daily Progress (Online & Offline).
IGUI_DCS_UserReset_Tooltip_AddAll: Add 1 Token to ALL Players (Online & Offline).
IGUI_DCS_UserReset_Confirm: Are you sure? This cannot be undone.
IGUI_DCS_ClientSync_ModOptions_KeybindDe: Opens or closes the Daily Challenge panel. No default keybind set.
IGUI_DCS_Challenge_Quest_Deposit: Deposit %1 in to the Safe at %2
IGUI_DCS_Settings_TokensPersistDeath_tip: When enabled, Token balances are preserved when a Character dies. When disabled, Tokens are reset to zero on death.
IGUI_DCS_Settings_LimitShopItems_tip: When enabled, each Vendor shows a limited daily-rotating selection (about 18 items per Vendor, balanced across categories) instead of the full catalogue, giving players a reason to return in future days. When disabled, Vendors show every enabled item, split between the two locations.
IGUI_DCS_Settings_ChallengeProgressPersi: When enabled, Daily Challenge progress (Daily Streak & current Challenge progress) is preserved when a Character dies. When disabled, all Challenge progress resets on death.
